text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Fifty seconds left. The crown piece on the top is 1.5 centimeters
off-center.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'll fix it. 1.5 centimeters... Okay, that should do it!

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text: Time's up! Well done to all our contestants!

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's get straight into the appraisal. Would representatives from
each team please introduce their entries?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I am shook! Our cake looks sick! We've got this in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ah! W-we're next! Hng... My heart is pounding!

text_block_list.name: Presenter
text_block_list.text:
Next up, let's hear from the Japan Umamusume Training Center
Academy!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I am Eishin Flash from Tracen Academy. The concept we
chose to represent our school was "the desire to win."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy is the leading racing school in the country for
Umamusume. Racing and competing are a part of our everyday lives.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, that doesn't mean that we all spend every waking minute
training.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Whether we're welcoming students in the morning, doing our nails at
break time, caring for the garden...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Passionately working as idols, modeling, spending our time in the
student council office, telling fortunes...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Or stressing over our studies, our friends—or even over our own
abilities... A day in Tracen Academy looks different for every one of
us.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But despite that, there's one thing that motivates us all—the desire to
win.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That's something that only our school can boast, and that's what we
poured into this cake.

text_block_list.name: Judge
text_block_list.text:
I see. "Eclipse first, the rest nowhere." You certainly understand the
spirit of your school's motto.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. We strive to surpass the competition. That is our inspiration,
pure and simple.

text_block_list.name: Judge
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, that was wonderful—not only the cake, but your deep
admiration for the school really came across too.
Clap clap clap...

And now, it's time to announce the winners of this year's Spring
Choice Chocolatier Contest!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aw, second place?! Ughhh, we were so clooose!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The winners were just one step ahead of us with their idea and
execution. ...That makes it all the more disappointing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes. Even though we did everything we could...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Whimper...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! As class representative, I find this extremely demoralizing!
Nghhh!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hm? I've identified a smile on your face. Did I miss something?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No, I was just thinking about how we're such Tracen Academy
students. Racing towards a common goal, feeling frustrated when we
fall short...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Because we all want to win, we all feel the same frustration when we
lose.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And so... it made me realize that we're all probably thinking the same
thing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I want to win next time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes. Next time... Next time, let's make sure we win!

text_block_list.name: The Four
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's go to the after-party! I'm ready to eat mad chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Um, Jordan, where would that be?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
The Chocolate Festival! Word is they've got a chocolate buffet, the
best patissiers from around the world—even performers and stuff!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The best patissiers from around the world?! I-I must verify this with my
own eyes!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Shall we go too, Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Flower, I have something to give to you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It's slightly early, but here is something you must have. It's the best
Valentine's chocolate I could make. Thank you for everything.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wha... what?! Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Facial expression identified as "peaceful." I had detected nervousness
from your expression earlier, so I was slightly worried.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You are a reliable person. You have supported me as your roommate
on numerous occasions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That's why when I heard we could recruit helpers, I came to you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will work towards being someone you can depend on too, so... I
request that we continue to be friends.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Bourbon... You didn't have to...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, gladly! Let's continue to be friends!
